response.justification: While Bogdan possesses strong technical skills in cloud architecture, distributed systems, and software design, he explicitly falls short of the mandatory 8 years of C++ programming experience. Furthermore, his resume does not clearly demonstrate formal technical leadership experience focused on mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers within a team lead context, which is crucial for this role.
strengths: Deep experience in large-scale infrastructure, distributed systems, and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker).
Proven ability in software design, architecture, and establishing engineering best practices (TDD, CI/CD).
Strong initiative and project ownership, evidenced by founding and maintaining an open-source platform.
concerns: Fails to meet the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming experience.
Limited explicit experience in a formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
Current roles lean towards senior individual contributor/architect rather than team technical lead.
